component.name: RailReader2
component.summary: AI-guided rail reading PDF viewer for comfortable high-magnification reading

description.p: RailReader2 is a desktop PDF viewer with AI-guided "rail reading" mode for high-magnification viewing. It uses an ONNX layout-detection model to identify text blocks, then locks the viewport to one block at a time so the reader can comfortably read at very high zoom levels without losing context.

ul.li: AI-detected layout for rail-style line-by-line reading at high magnification
Annotations: highlight, freehand, rectangle, text notes
Named bookmarks, outline navigation, full-text search
Markdown export via VLM transcription of figures, tables, equations
Colour effects (high contrast, amber, invert) for vision comfort
